slider.versiculo: And so I have made it my aim to preach the gospel, not where Christ was named, lest I should build on another man’s foundation, but as it is written: To whom He was not announced, they shall see; And those who have not heard shall understand.
slider.texto: Priority One is an evangelization project whose mission is to reach, with the message of the gospel of the kingdom of God, the different ethnic groups of the Bolivian Amazon, paying special attention to those who have never heard of Jesus, nor of His redemptive work on behalf of humanity.

about_us.title: About us
about_us.versiculo: And so I have made it my aim to preach the gospel, not where Christ was named, lest I should build on another man’s foundation, but as it is written: To whom He was not announced, they shall see; And those who have not heard shall understand.
about_us.texto1: We are a Church committed to completing the task of bringing the Gospel to all Nations, making disciples of Christ and faithfully teaching the Word of God (The Bible).

credo.texto1: In God, who is eternal Spirit, immutable, omniscient, omnipresent, holy, just and merciful, who manifests Himself in creation, in the Bible, in the conscience of men, and who, furthermore, has revealed Himself incorporating the principles of relationship and association as Father, Son and Holy Spirit, being three persons in one, of the same substance, of eternal being and equal in holiness, justice, wisdom, power and dignity.
credo.texto2: In the preexistence, deity and humiliation of Jesus Christ and in His virgin birth by the work of the Holy Spirit.
credo.texto3: In the personality and deity of the Holy Spirit, who was sent to accomplish the works of the Father and the Son in the world.
credo.texto4: That the human being was created good and upright, but that, by voluntarily transgressing the law of God, suffered as a consequence not only physical death but also spiritual death, which is the separation of the soul from God. Consequently, there is a need for a new birth.
credo.texto5: In the vicarious atonement of the Lord Jesus Christ through the shedding of His own blood, and by having taken upon Himself our sins and received our punishment, He is the only Savior of the world. Being the only begotten Son of God, He has the authority to forgive our sins.
credo.texto6: In the return of Jesus Christ according to the Scriptures.
credo.texto7: That the Holy Scriptures are inspired by God, and therefore are the revelation of God to man, the authority and the only rule of faith and conduct.
credo.texto8: That we are justified by personal faith in Jesus Christ.
credo.texto9: That the works of righteousness are the result of the new life begotten in the believer.
credo.texto10: In the resurrection of all the dead, the judgment of the world, eternal life for believers in Christ and the eternal condemnation of those who reject Him.
credo.texto11: That the Holy Scriptures teach and provide for a life of holiness without which no one shall see God, and that sanctification is a work of God appropriated by faith and made effective by the Holy Spirit through the instrumentality of the Word, which separates us from evil and leads us progressively toward perfection.
credo.texto12: That believers have the right and the duty to sincerely seek and await the promise of the Father, which is the baptism in the Holy Spirit and fire, according to the commandment of our Lord Jesus Christ. This was the normal promise for all in the early church and is obtained through an act of faith on the part of the cleansed believer. We receive it as on the day of Pentecost.
credo.texto13: That the Holy Spirit grants gifts to believers for the ministry and edification of the church.
credo.texto14: That the believer must observe the following ordinances: water baptism, the Lord's Supper and gathering with the fellowship of the faith.
credo.atribute: Statement of faith shared by the 'Asociación Civil Evangélica Seminario Bíblico de Fe', National Registry of Religious Organizations number 2866. Legal Entity, General Inspectorate of Justice number 00041, to the Church of the Lord Association.
